hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in *.go) gofmt -w "$f" ;; *.md|*.html|*.yml|*.yaml|*.json) if rg -n '\.meta/|/specs/|specs/(product|rfc|api|db|testing|README)' "$f" >/dev/null; then echo "Legacy /specs/ or .meta/ reference found in $f" >&2; exit 1; fi ;; esac
